register:body=>unwrap(API.post('/auth/register',body)),login:body=>unwrap(API.post('/auth/login',body)),me:()=>unwrap(API.get('/auth/me')),logout:()=>API.post('/auth/logout'),// Catalog
categories:()=>unwrap(API.get('/categories')),suppliersForCategory:slug=>unwrap(API.get("/categories/".concat(slug,"/suppliers"))),suppliers:()=>unwrap(API.get('/suppliers')),toggleSupplier:(id,enabled)=>unwrap(API.patch("/suppliers/".concat(id),{enabled})),// Search
